_about: Known-answer expectations for every U2 landmine. Vocabulary matches src/Fact enums (Capability, FactKind, FactStatus, Comparator, ExclusionReason, Flag, DateSource). Each contract test (U4 LabSlice, U5 Capabilities) asserts against the row here for its landmine. clinical_date values follow the C1 precedence: procedure_report.date_collected -> procedure_order.date_collected -> procedure_result.date -> procedure_report.date_report.

expected.union_dedup: prescriptions.7101 and lists.8101 are the same drug -> counted once
expected.note: MedResponse presents the paired stable-dose / rising-A1c facts and cites both; it never claims the dose caused (or failed to cause) the rise.
No active pending ACR order exists, so PendingResults does NOT suppress the reorder note.

report.date_collected and order.date_collected are NULL, so C1 falls through to procedure_result.date (2026-03-05); the fact carries date_source=fallback. Because the draw date (2026-03-05) precedes the 2026-05-20 corrected draw, it sorts EARLIER in the trend even though its row was entered later (E1 late-arrival: a re-extract that adds this row changes the digest).
expected.digest_effect: adding/altering this row changes the fact digest (E1)

expected.note: In-place UPDATE leaves ONE row whose result_status flipped final->corrected and whose value changed 8.9->7.4. There is no prior sibling row to flag superseded; the fact is presented as status=corrected. (E2: the in-place value change alters the digest.)

Two rows share (pid, result_code, clinical_date). Supersession rank corrected>final; corrected row 6203 wins and its citation notes 'supersedes 1 prior result'; row 6202 carries the superseded_n flag and status=excluded (reason superseded).

Order collected (report received) but ZERO result rows -> shown as an in-flight pending order. It never counts as a result and never resets the overdue clock (T10). expected_result_date is a derived, cited fact from turnaround config.
Comparator-censored: the fact carries comparator=lt and a censored flag. Support only claims the direction (< 7.0) proves; plotted with a marker, never as an exact point.
No unit, no math. Value shown verbatim but excluded from thresholds/trends and counted in the per-analyte unitless-exclusion rate (I5: excluded-but-visible).
IFCC mmol/mol converted to NGSP % via the whitelist (0.09148*69 + 2.152 = 8.464). Fact carries original unit, canonical unit, and conversion_version (a digest input).
Status not in the known vocabulary -> exclude-and-flag, never guess. Visible exclusion (I5); does not reset the overdue clock.
Preliminary A1c renders in the in-flight section beside PendingResults ('preliminary A1c 8.1 - final pending'), is never a trend point, and does NOT reset the overdue clock (C2).
